subcodes.first_line: The first commandment hath ever been the recognition of God—glorified be His grandeur—and the last thereof steadfastness in His Cause. Blessed is the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول امر عرفان حق جل جلاله بوده و آخر آن استقامت بر امرش نیکوست حال نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God
